# Dreadstump's Rapier
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Dreadstump%27s%20Rapier&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Dreadstump's Rapier
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = l
| desc = Finesse of the high seas, Thanks to: Nekrie.

| rof = 175
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 350
| minDmg = 150
| maxDmg = 200
| frequency = 0.25
| amplitude = 0.25
| feedp = 333    

|lootbag = white
|shots = 1|range2 = 4.5|fameb = 5|bonuses = {{Stat|spd|4}}{{Stat|vit|3}}|legendary = 1}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
